themes.label: Covenant
themes.summary: This chapter points to covenant, promise, oath, inheritance, or the enduring faithfulness of God. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 8 verses. Commentary leans on "Neither with you only do I make this covenant and this oath. The covenant extends beyond thos...". Cross references echo "Covenant".

themes.label: Judgment
themes.summary: This chapter addresses wrath, judgment, condemnation, justice, or divine reckoning. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "And the LORD rooted them out of their land in anger, and in wrath, and in great indignation,...". Word-study detail reinforces "וּבְחֵמָ֖ה: and in wrath - heat; figuratively, anger, poison (from its fever)".
